qradar:
SELECT * FROM events
WHERE LOGSOURCEGROUPNAME = 'Windows'
  AND (DESTINATIONIP ILIKE '%185.220.101.1%')
LAST 24 HOURS
sentinel:
SysmonEvent
| where EventID == 3
| where DestinationIp contains "185.220.101.1"
wazuh:
<group name="sigma_rules,">
    <!-- Generated by SigmaForge — Wazuh XML backend -->
    <!-- Rule: Threat Intel IP IOC — 185.220.101.1 (score: 47) -->
    <!-- WARNING: Unmapped field(s) used as-is: DestinationIp -->
    <!-- Extend the 'windows_eventchannel' sub-dict of WAZUH_FIELD_MAP in sigma_engine.py to map these fields -->

    <!-- TODO: assign unique rule ID before deployment -->
    <rule id="100001" level="10">
        <if_sid>60000</if_sid>
        <decoded_as>windows_eventchannel</decoded_as>
        <field name="win.system.eventID">^3$</field>
        <field name="DestinationIp">185\.220\.101\.1</field>
        <description>Threat Intel IP IOC — 185.220.101.1 (score: 47)</description>
        <mitre>
          <id>t1071</id>
          <id>t1071.001</id>
        </mitre>
        <group>attack_command_and_control,sigma_high,</group>
